name: Wells Fargo & Company
description: Wells Fargo & Company is a leading financial services company that provides a wide range of banking, investment, mortgage, and commercial finance products and services. Headquartered in San Francisco, California, the company serves millions of customers through its extensive network of branches, ATMs, and digital platforms. Wells Fargo is committed to building a stronger, better company by focusing on serving customers at the highest standards, fostering diversity and inclusion, and maintaining robust corporate governance and ethical practices across its diverse business lines.
